title: Add test vectors, interop tests, and unit tests for mesh-to-internet forwarding
description: Extend test/vectors/ with forwarding scenarios. Add integration tests in lichen-gateway and lichen-sim for mesh node pinging internet host via gateway (using TUN or mock). Ensure Rust-C interop if applicable. Update lichen-rpl tests if needed. Verify with cargo test.
close_reason: Added classify_02xx_primary test; interop via shared test vectors in lichen-rpl/gateway; full test suite passes with 3 review passes (fmt/clippy/test).
